meta.listDescription: Create and follow real support tickets for booking, payment, account, or technical help.
meta.detailDescription: Read your support ticket thread and send a follow-up reply.

home.title: Get practical help without losing your place in the care journey.
home.note: Use support for booking, payment, account, matching, or technical issues. This is separate from therapy and care conversations.
home.assuranceNote: Support tickets help you follow one issue clearly from the first message to the latest reply.

create.heading: Create a support ticket
create.note: Tell us what is going wrong, and the thread will stay in one clear place.

placeholders.subject: For example: I cannot complete payment
placeholders.description: Explain the issue in your own words. Include what you tried and what you still need help with.

create.helper: Attachments are not supported in this version yet, so the best first step is a clear written explanation.

list.heading: Your support tickets
list.note: Open a ticket to read the full thread or send a new reply.

detail.helperNote: This space is for support follow-up such as booking, payments, technical issues, or account help. It is not therapy chat.
detail.noDescription: This ticket does not include a separate description.

thread.heading: Conversation
thread.note: Read the full support thread in order and send your next reply from here.

empty.heading: No messages yet
empty.note: When support replies, the conversation will appear here.

reply.heading: Reply to this ticket
reply.note: Add any update or answer here. Your message will appear in the same thread.

empty.heading: No support tickets yet
empty.note: If you need help with booking, payment, technical issues, or your account, create your first ticket here.

listError.heading: Support tickets are not available right now
listError.note: We could not load your support tickets at the moment. Please try again shortly.

detailError.heading: This support ticket is not available right now
detailError.note: It may have been removed, or we could not load it at the moment.

boundaries.heading: What this page supports
boundaries.note: This web flow currently supports creating tickets, reading the thread, and sending text replies only.

handoff.heading: If you need care guidance instead
handoff.note: Support is for operational issues only. If you are deciding what to do next in your care journey, these patient routes are a better fit.
handoff.matchingNote: Use matching when you want help narrowing down the right practitioner.
handoff.assessmentsNote: Use a short check-in when you want a calmer reflection step before booking or matching.

errors.generic: We could not complete this support action right now. Please try again.

meta.listDescription: Create and follow real practitioner support tickets for operational, account, payment, or technical issues.
meta.detailDescription: Read the full practitioner support thread and send a follow-up reply.

home.title: Get operational help without leaving your practitioner workspace.
home.note: Use support for practitioner-side operational issues such as sessions, payments, account access, platform issues, or other non-clinical requests.
home.assuranceNote: Each support issue stays in one thread so you can follow replies, updates, and resolution clearly.

create.heading: Create a support ticket
create.note: Describe the issue clearly so support can follow it in one organized thread.

placeholders.subject: For example: I cannot update my availability
placeholders.description: Explain the issue clearly. Include what you tried, what happened, and what kind of help you need next.

create.helper: Attachments are not supported in this version yet, so a clear written explanation is the best first step.

list.heading: Your support tickets
list.note: Open any ticket to read the thread or send a follow-up reply.

detail.helperNote: This space is for platform and operational help such as sessions, payments, account issues, and technical problems. It is not practitioner-patient messaging.
detail.noDescription: This ticket does not include a separate description.

thread.heading: Conversation
thread.note: Read the support conversation in order and send your next reply from here.

empty.heading: No messages yet
empty.note: When support replies, the conversation will appear here.

reply.heading: Reply to this ticket
reply.note: Add any update or answer here. Your message will appear in the same thread.

empty.heading: No support tickets yet
empty.note: If you need help with sessions, payments, account access, or technical issues, create your first ticket here.

listError.heading: Support tickets are not available right now
listError.note: We could not load your support tickets at the moment. Please try again shortly.

detailError.heading: This support ticket is not available right now
detailError.note: It may have been removed, or we could not load it at the moment.

boundaries.heading: What this page supports
boundaries.note: This web flow currently supports creating tickets, reading the thread, and sending text replies only.

errors.generic: We could not complete this support action right now. Please try again.

meta.listDescription: Review and manage all platform support tickets.
meta.detailDescription: Read the ticket thread, add a reply or internal note, change status, or reassign.

list.heading: Support tickets
list.note: Open a ticket to read the thread, reply, add internal notes, or update its status.

status.heading: Change status
status.label: New status
status.error: Could not update status. Please try again.
status.closedNote: This ticket is closed and cannot be updated.

assign.heading: Assignment
assign.label: Admin user ID
assign.error: Could not update assignment. Please try again.

thread.heading: Message thread
thread.note: Messages visible to the user and practitioner.

empty.heading: No messages yet
empty.note: When the user or support team sends a message, it will appear here.

internalNotes.heading: Internal notes
internalNotes.note: Admin only — not visible to the user or practitioner.

reply.heading: Reply to user
reply.note: This message will be visible to the user in the ticket thread.
reply.error: Could not send reply. Please try again.
reply.blockedOtherAgent: This ticket is assigned to another support agent. Transfer ownership before replying.
reply.unassignedNotice: Your first reply will assign this ticket to you.

note.heading: Add internal note
note.note: This note is admin-only and will not be visible to the user.
note.error: Could not add note. Please try again.

empty.heading: No support tickets
empty.note: There are no support tickets matching the current filters.

listError.heading: Support tickets are not available right now
listError.note: We could not load the support tickets. Please try again shortly.

detailError.heading: This ticket is not available
detailError.note: It may have been removed, or we could not load it at the moment.

errors.generic: We could not complete this action right now. Please try again.
